name: LED Rope Light For Outdoor Party Decoration – IP65
description: The Outdoor Party Decoration LED Rope Light is a durable and energy-efficient lighting solution ideal for streets, gardens, hotels, parks, and theme parks. It features soft warm white light at 2700K, multiple color options (red, yellow, blue, green, white, warm white, pink, purple), and supports dimming via remote or switch control. Made with PVC and pure copper wire, it’s cold- and heat-resistant, eco-friendly, and tested for durability. With an IP65 rating, it’s suitable for outdoor use, offering 1100 lm brightness, 50 lm/W efficiency, and a 50,000-hour lifespan.
short_desc: Specifications: Length: 100m/roll (36 LEDs/m) Voltage: 24V / 110V / 220V CCT: 2700K (Soft Warm White) Control: Remote & Switch Control Dimmable: Yes Brightness: 1100 lm Efficiency: 50 lm/W CRI: 70 Material: PVC, Pure Copper Wire IP Rating: IP65 (Outdoor use) Lifespan: 50,000 hours Working Temp: -40°C to 60°C Colors: Red, Yellow, Blue, Green, White, Warm White, Pink, Purple Applications: Garden, Street, Hotel, Park, Theme Park, Square Certifications: CE, RoHS Warranty: 1 Year Extras: Installation guide, Warranty certificate Features: Eco-friendly, Cold & Heat Resistant, Aging Tested
